Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 81 upvotes, 11 comments
  2. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 48 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 198 upvotes, 45 comments
  4. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 39 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. GitHub's Historic Uptime 292 upvotes, 83 comments
  6. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 249 upvotes, 78 comments
  7. Nematophagous Fungus 23 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. 4D Doom 14 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Combinators 118 upvotes, 35 comments
  10. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1727 upvotes, 698 comments
  11. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 375 upvotes, 145 comments
  12. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 39 upvotes, 9 comments
  13. Ministack (Replacement for LocalStack) 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  14. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 399 upvotes, 163 comments
  15. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 131 upvotes, 46 comments
  16. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 94 upvotes, 33 comments
  17. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1769 upvotes, 870 comments
  18. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 40 upvotes, 12 comments
  19. Show HN: Postgres extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search 57 upvotes, 22 comments
  20. I Traced My Traffic Through a Home Tailscale Exit Node 22 upvotes, 6 comments
  21. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 178 upvotes, 115 comments
  22. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 38 upvotes, 19 comments
  23. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 115 upvotes, 79 comments
  24. JSSE: A JavaScript Engine Built by an Agent 14 upvotes, 5 comments
  25. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 794 upvotes, 690 comments
  26. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 35 upvotes, 21 comments
  27. OpenAI raises $122B 108 upvotes, 88 comments
  28. Slop is not necessarily the future 117 upvotes, 219 comments
  29. Ask HN: Distributed data centers in our basements 32 upvotes, 52 comments
  30. Why the US Navy won't blast the Iranians and 'open' Strait of Hormuz 84 upvotes, 182 comments

Last generated 5:30am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
